title: 30o: validate_sha256_format cites wrong RFC
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs line 177: validate_sha256_format doc comment says 'RFC 6570 / JMAP-CID'. RFC 6570 is the URI template spec and has nothing to do with SHA-256 format. The citation is misleading; the actual source is draft-ietf-jmap-blobext or JMAP-CID spec. Remove RFC 6570 from this comment.
